meaning: <意>{画}n.(使素描中的明暗或色彩中的色阶有层次地调和的)渲染层次
examples: The sfumato was Leonardo's way of blending colors as softly as smoke.
The sfumato was Leonardo's way of blending colours as softly as smoke.
To judge from the blog started by some of the centre's disgruntled staff, their mood is decidedly sfumato.
